title: Quantitative Study Group: T_1
author: Tatman, Ben
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this directory there are  T_ 1 inversion recovery datasets recorded in magnitude mode at 10 inversion times using a Siemens Prisma 3T MRI scanner. Each image contains a phantom with 12 vials, each with a different SI traceable concentration of MnCl_2 or NiCl_2.
steps_raw: In this directory there are  T_ 1 inversion recovery datasets recorded in magnitude mode at 10 inversion times using a Siemens Prisma 3T MRI scanner. Each image contains a phantom with 12 vials, each with a different SI traceable concentration of MnCl_2 or NiCl_2.
